name: Upstash Memory
description: Long-term vector memory for OpenClaw agents using Upstash Vector (Tokyo region)

url.label: Upstash Vector REST URL
url.help: Upstash Vector REST URL (or use ${UPSTASH_VECTOR_REST_URL} env var)

token.label: Upstash Vector REST Token
token.help: Upstash Vector REST token (or use ${UPSTASH_VECTOR_REST_TOKEN} env var)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Unique identifier for this agent (used as namespace prefix)

compactAfterDays.label: Compact After Days
compactAfterDays.help: Days after which old turns are compacted into Upstash Vector
